security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'self' blob: data:

bundle.longDescription: A native Ubuntu desktop build of Open Design (Tauri + Rust).
